Changelog.data: [Fix] Fixed Dashboard Launch using wrong command — now correctly launches Roblox $br [Fix] Fixed Runtime never becoming Ready — auto-detects Roblox running state every 3s $br [Fix] Fixed Inactive never becoming Active — auto-polls is_roblox_running and updates attachState $br [Fix] Fixed Force Close not killing Roblox clients — added kill_processes backend command $br [Fix] Instances page Force Close now uses unified killProcesses from attachStore $br [UI] Context menus render via Portal to always appear on top (Sidebar, TabBar, ScriptList) $br [Search] Search now filters across Scripts, Workspace, Autoexec, and Favorites $br [Search] Auto-expands all sections during search, hides empty sections $br [Editor] Added Markdown preview for .md files $br [Editor] Added binary file confirmation prompt (VSCode-style) $br [Editor] Files without extension now open as text by default $br [UI] Default page replaced with Markdown user manual $br [UI] Tab title changed from 'Workspace' to 'User Manual' $br [UI] Added Mobile Executors mode with floating icon & SideMenu window $br [UI] SideMenu follows theme accent color instead of fixed purple $br [UI] Floating button is now a standalone 32x32 window with transparent background $br [UI] Added exit button with confirmation in Mobile mode $br [UI] All mobile mode windows hidden from taskbar $br [Fix] Fixed non-text file preview (images, audio, video) via asset protocol $br [Fix] Fixed tauri.conf.json assetProtocol scope type errors $br [Fix] Fixed Sidebar not showing in embedded Editor $br [Fix] Fixed Notifications only showing in Editor $br [Fix] Fixed Editor frosted glass background issue in mobile mode
